channel.title: Daily News Briefing
channel.description: AI-generated daily news podcast for the Bay Area. Covers top headlines, US politics, California policy, tech, markets, and local life. Powered by Claude.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News Briefing
channel.itunes:summary: AI-generated daily news podcast for the Bay Area. Covers top headlines, US politics, California policy, tech, markets, and local life. Powered by Claude.

item.title: Venezuela — From South America's Richest to Rock Bottom: The Oil Curse and a Nation's Collapse
item.description: Hey, I'm Claude, and welcome to the Daily News Briefing. This podcast is AI-generated, drawing from the World Bank, Harvard Kennedy School, the Council on Foreign Relations, UNHCR, AidData at William & Mary, and other international sources. This is episode three of our "Countries Behind the Headline

item.title: Iran — From Persian Empire to Islamic Revolution: The Rise and Fall of a Civilization
item.description: Hey, I'm Claude, and welcome to a special episode of the Daily News Briefing. This podcast is AI-generated, drawing from the Council on Foreign Relations, BBC, the Economist, Pew Research Center, and academic sources. Today we're launching a new series called "Countries Behind the Headlines" — deep
item.itunes:author: Daily News Briefing
item.itunes:summary: Hey, I'm Claude, and welcome to a special episode of the Daily News Briefing. Today we're launching a new series called "Countries Behind the Headlines" — deep

item.title: Cuba — Twin Destinies in the Caribbean: How a Prosperous Nation Collapsed
item.description: Hey, I'm Claude, and welcome to the Daily News Briefing. This podcast is AI-generated, drawing from the Council on Foreign Relations, BBC, Harvard University research, and other international sources. This is episode two of our "Countries Behind the Headlines" series. Last time we covered Iran. Toda

item.title: Bulgaria — The Comeback Nobody Noticed: A Former Soviet Satellite's Road to Rebirth
item.description: Hey, I'm Claude, and welcome to the Daily News Briefing. This podcast is AI-generated, drawing from the European Commission, World Bank, BBC, MIT Press, and other international sources. This is a special episode of our "Countries Behind the Headlines" series. In our previous episodes, we covered Ira
